sentences.arabic: تَتَمَيَّزُ الْعِمَارَةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ بِفَلْسَفَةٍ جَمَالِيَّةٍ فَرِيدَةٍ مِنْ نَوْعِهَا.
sentences.translation: Islamsku arhitekturu karakteriše jedinstvena estetska filozofija svoje vrste.
sentences.translationEn: Islamic architecture is characterized by a unique aesthetic philosophy of its kind.

sentences.arabic: هِيَ تَمْزُجُ بَيْنَ الْوَظِيفَةِ الْعَمَلِيَّةِ وَالرُّوحَانِيَّةِ السَّامِيَةِ بِشَكْلٍ مَبْهُرٍ.
sentences.translation: Ona na impresivan način spaja praktičnu funkciju i uzvišenu duhovnost.
sentences.translationEn: It impressively blends practical function with sublime spirituality.

sentences.arabic: يَتَجَلَّى ذَلِكَ الْإِبْدَاعُ فِي اسْتِخْدَامِ الْأَشْكَالِ الْهَنْدَسِيَّةِ الْمُعَقَّدَةِ وَالْمُتَنَاغِمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ta kreativnost se očituje u upotrebi složenih i harmoničnih geometrijskih oblika.
sentences.translationEn: This creativity is manifested in the use of complex and harmonious geometric shapes.

sentences.arabic: لَقَدْ أُبْدِعَتْ هَذِهِ التَّصَامِيمُ لِتَعْكِسَ مَفْهُومَ الْوَحْدَةِ فِي ظِلِّ التَّنَوُّعِ.
sentences.translation: Ovi dizajni su stvoreni da odražavaju koncept jedinstva u okviru različitosti.
sentences.translationEn: These designs were created to reflect the concept of unity amidst diversity.

sentences.arabic: جَعَلَ ذَلِكَ الْمَسَاجِدَ وَالْقُصُورَ شَوَاهِدَ حَيَّةً عَلَى رُقِيِّ الْحَضَارَةِ الْقَدِيمَةِ.
sentences.translation: To je džamije i palate učinilo živim svjedocima napretka drevne civilizacije.
sentences.translationEn: This made mosques and palaces living witnesses to the sophistication of the ancient civilization.

sentences.arabic: إِذَا تَأَمَّلْنَا الزَّخَارِفَ النَّبَاتِيَّةَ، سَنَجِدُ أَنَّهَا لَمْ تُوضَعْ عَبَثًا أَبَدًا.
sentences.translation: Ako posmatramo biljne ukrase, otkrit ćemo da oni nikada nisu postavljeni uzalud.
sentences.translationEn: If we contemplate the floral decorations, we will find that they were never placed in vain.

sentences.arabic: بَلْ وُضِعَتْ لِإِضْفَاءِ لَمْسَةٍ مِنَ الْخُلُودِ وَالْجَمَالِ عَلَى جُدْرَانِ الْبِنَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Naprotiv, postavljeni su kako bi zidovima građevine dali dašak vječnosti i ljepote.
sentences.translationEn: Rather, they were placed to bestow a touch of eternity and beauty upon the walls of the building.

sentences.arabic: وَمِنْ أَبْرَزِ الْعَنَاصِرِ الْمِعْمَارِيَّةِ مَا يُعْرَفُ بِاسْمِ "الصَّحْنِ" الدَّاخِلِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Među najistaknutijim arhitektonskim elementima je ono što je poznato kao unutrašnje dvorište (sahn).
sentences.translationEn: Among the most prominent architectural elements is what is known as the inner courtyard (sahn).

sentences.arabic: هُوَ يُعَدُّ قَلْبَ الْمَنْزِلِ الَّذِي يُوَفِّرُ الْخُصُوصِيَّةَ وَالرَّاحَةَ لِلسُّكَّانِ.
sentences.translation: Ono se smatra srcem kuće koje stanovnicima pruža privatnost i udobnost.
sentences.translationEn: It is considered the heart of the house, providing privacy and comfort for the residents.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا اسْتُخْدِمَتِ الْأَقْوَاسُ وَالْقِبَابُ لِتَحْقِيقِ تَوَازُنٍ بَصَرِيٍّ وَإِنْشَائِيٍّ بَدِيعٍ.
sentences.translation: Također su korišteni lukovi i kupole kako bi se postigla izuzetna vizuelna i strukturalna ravnoteža.
sentences.translationEn: Arches and domes were also used to achieve an exquisite visual and structural balance.

sentences.arabic: يُثْبِتُ هَذَا أَنَّ الْمِعْمَارَ الْعَرَبِيَّ لَمْ يَكُنْ مُجَرَّدَ بِنَاءٍ جَامِدٍ.
sentences.translation: Ovo dokazuje da arapska arhitektura nije bila samo puka kruta gradnja.
sentences.translationEn: This proves that Arab architecture was not just rigid construction.

sentences.arabic: بَلْ كَانَ فَنًّا رَفِيعًا يَعْكِسُ ثَقَافَةً وَتَارِيخًا طَوِيلًا مِنَ الْعَطَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Bila je to uzvišena umjetnost koja odražava kulturu i dugu istoriju davanja.
sentences.translationEn: Instead, it was a fine art reflecting a culture and a long history of contribution.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الِاهْتِمَامَ بِالتَّفَاصِيلِ فِي نَحْتِ الْحِجَارَةِ يَعْكِسُ التَّطَوُّرَ الْعِلْمِيَّ.
sentences.translation: Pažnja posvećena detaljima u klesanju kamena odražava naučni razvoj.
sentences.translationEn: The attention to detail in stone carving reflects the scientific development achieved.

sentences.arabic: وَبِذَلِكَ تَظَلُّ هَذِهِ الْآثَارُ مَصْدَرَ فِخْرٍ لِلْأَجْيَالِ الْمُتَعَاقِبَةِ.
sentences.translation: Tako ovi spomenici ostaju izvor ponosa za uzastopne generacije.
sentences.translationEn: Thus, these monuments remain a source of pride for successive generations.
